message:
type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Adding relevance_scores param to NDCG.compute for graded relevance support

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Fixing NDCG IDCG calculation to use expected relevant doc count instead of retrieved doc count

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Added relevance_scores param to NDCG.compute (graded relevance); DCG/IDCG now use a relevance() helper based on relevance_scores dict, ideal_length still min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) - let me know if your IDCG fix changes that formula so I can merge cleanly

type: ANSWER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Yes: IDCG loop now ranges over len(expected_ids) (not min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))) - please update your relevance()-based idcg sum to use range(1, len(expected_ids)+1) so it doesn't reintroduce the old bug
